findings.title: No logging of failed authentication attempts
findings.description: Login handler returns error responses for invalid credentials without logging the failed attempt

findings.title: No logging of successful authentication events
findings.description: Successful login returns token and sensitive data without logging the authentication event

findings.title: No audit logging for privilege escalation operations
findings.description: Role change handler modifies user privileges without any audit log entry

findings.title: No logging of financial transactions
findings.description: Transaction creation and bulk transfer handlers process financial operations without audit logging

findings.title: No logging of sensitive data export
findings.description: Data export handler allows bulk extraction of user records including passwords without logging

findings.title: No logging of security configuration changes
findings.description: API key regeneration and MFA toggle handlers modify security settings without audit logging
